creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
Update to Nagios 3.0:

* Faster program startup times (especially in large installs) with new object
  lookup code
* Fix for special contact inheritance rules in host and service escalations
* Configure script fix
* Fix for bug in processing $CONTACTADDRESSx$ macros
* Documentation fixes

Fix: Downloadable diff from:
http://www.netleader.com.au/~jarrod/FreeBSD/net-mgmt-nagios-devel-3.0.diff
